title: Crystal Hearts
description: Adds rare consumables that permanently increase max health by +2 HP, up to 20 hearts total, with progress that persists across deaths.
body:
Heart Crystals introduces a rare consumable item that permanently expands your maximum health, offering a new sense of long-term progression to your adventure.

##  What It Adds?
Heart Crystals are special items that, when right-clicked, provide:

- +2 permanent maximum health (one full heart)
- An instant full heal on use
- Progression that fully persists across deaths, dimension changes, and world reloads
Each character can consume up to 10 crystals, reaching a true maximum of 20 hearts, correctly displayed by the game‚Äôs HUD.
